bean 0.1.2
  • Functions
    • 1. Data Prep
    • 2. Environmental Thinning
    • 3. Niche Delineation & Mapping

Package index

Data Preparation

Functions for preparing and cleaning occurrence data.

prepare_bean()
Prepare data for environmental thinning

Thinning Logic

Functions for addressing sampling bias by thinning in environmental space (E-space).

find_env_resolution()
Find objective environmental resolution using the Nearest Neighbor Elbow Method
thin_env_nd()
Thin occurrence data in n-dimensional environmental space
thin_env_center()
Deterministic centroid
plot_bean()
Visualize n-dimensional environmental thinning results

Modeling & Visualization

Functions for fundamental niche delineation and predicting suitability.

fit_ellipsoid()
Outlier removal
predict(<bean_ellipsoid>)
Predict suitability and Mahalanobis distance from a bean ellipsoid
